author: Ilya
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. AI-powered compoundable knowledge base — extracts, synthesizes and maintains a wiki from raw sources.

name: AI Wiki

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 0.1.151

### Fixes
- fix(lint): exclude wiki page stems from wiki_sources restore and validation
- fix(lint): quote [[...]] in wiki_sources to prevent YAML flow-sequence misparse
- fix(lint): keep path-based wiki_sources entries (e.g. Sources/raw.md) valid

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ikeniborn/obsidian-ai-wiki/compare/0.1.150...0.1.151

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 0.1.150

### Fixes

### Other

- refactor(i18n): add h3_jaccard key for all locales

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ikeniborn/obsidian-ai-wiki/compare/0.1.149...0.1.150

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 0.1.147

### New
- feat(frontmatter): add remove FieldRule kind, strip annotation from wiki pages
- feat(frontmatter): add ensureWikiSources — inject sourceStem when wiki_sources absent
- feat(ingest): inject wiki_sources when absent, strip annotation from frontmatter

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ikeniborn/obsidian-ai-wiki/compare/0.1.146...0.1.147

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 0.1.146

### New
- feat(view): multi-line trace format for seeds and BFS hops in graph stats
- feat(view): render extended graph trace (seeds with scores, BFS hop breakdown) when agentLogEnabled
- feat(view): confirm modal before domain registration — cancel prevents creation
- feat(view): force reinit on source removal in manage sources flow
- feat(query): collect seed scores and BFS-by-hop, emit in graph_stats event
- feat(wiki-graph): add bfsExpandWithHops — tracks expanded pages by BFS depth
- feat(types): extend graph_stats with seedScores and expandedByHop fields
- feat(page-similarity): add selectRelevantScored — returns {path, score}[]
- feat(wiki-seeds): selectSeeds returns scored results {id, score}[]
- feat(llm-utils): computeSpeedText shows token counts alongside tok/s
- feat(lint): add cleanupInvalidPages pass — deletes invalid wiki articles before LLM steps
- feat(lint): add bucket repair pass for wiki_sources / wiki_outgoing_links
- feat(lint): filter stale wiki_outgoing_links and wiki_articles vault-wide
- feat(ingest): validate and auto-repair frontmatter before writing source and wiki pages
- feat(ingest): filter stale wiki_articles and related links after repair
- feat(prompts): forbid source names in outgoing_links and dead wiki links
- feat(validator): add list-wikilinks-wiki-only and list-wikilinks-sources-only FieldRule kinds
- feat(raw-frontmatter): add FieldRule type, validateAndRepairFrontmatter helper, wiki/source page validators
- feat(vault): add rmdir to VaultAdapter and removeSubfolders to VaultTools

### Fixes
- fix(bfs): guard phantom nodes in bfsExpand and bfsExpandWithHops — dangling links no longer enter expanded set
- fix(query): exclude _config/ directory files from BFS graph
- fix(raw-frontmatter): replace regex upsertRawFrontmatter with YAML parse→mutate→serialize
- fix(raw-frontmatter): allow hyphens in tag segments (TAG_RE)
- fix(raw-frontmatter): track modified flag; delete empty lists; fix aliases warning
- fix(ingest): delete wiki pages missing wiki_sources before LLM calls
- fix(ingest): delete unprefixed legacy pages instead of warn-only
- fix(ingest): emit domain_updated after source_path_added
- fix(ingest): skip allFailed halt when wiki is empty
- fix(init): preserve language_notes during reinit
- fix(init): remove subdirectories after files in wipeDomainFolder
- fix(init): use domain wiki path for annotationsCache
- fix(similarity): allFailed=false when no pages exist in embedding path
- fix(lint): remove related field from source stale-link pass — user cross-refs are ingest-only
- fix(prompt): allow entity extraction for unknown concept types; prohibit wikilink alias syntax; show optional type field
- fix(wiki-link-validator): three bugs causing spurious WikiLink warnings
- fix(vault-walk): strip trailing slash before getFolderByPath

### Other
- refactor(raw-frontmatter): use gm flag instead of do-while loop in removeWikiFields

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ikeniborn/obsidian-ai-wiki/compare/0.1.145...0.1.146

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 0.1.145

### New
- feat(ingest): entity-driven two-call orchestration with merge-delete support
- feat(ingest): enforce wiki_<domain>_<entity> stem mask with migration
- feat(ingest): add EntitiesOutputSchema and deletes[] field on WikiPagesOutputSchema
- feat(ingest): add ingest-entities.md system prompt for entity extraction (LLM #1)
- feat(ingest): document merge via pages+deletes in ingest prompt
- feat(ingest): add PageSimilarityService.selectByEntities
- feat(ingest): add mergeDeleteWarnThreshold setting + AgentRunner wiring
- feat(ingest): support УДАЛЕНА action in ingest log
- feat(ingest): add removeIndexAnnotation for merge-delete cleanup
- feat(ingest): emit info_text with entity breakdown instead of lost assistant_text
- feat(lint): replace batch LLM call with per-article loop using similarity context
- feat(prompt): add per-article context format and delete instructions to lint prompt
- feat(schema): add deletes field to LintOutputSchema for duplicate removal
- feat(view): render info_text events as progress step items with entity list
- feat(types): add info_text RunEvent variant for phase status messages

### Fixes
- fix(ingest): tighten apiKey guard and dedupe Jaccard fallback in selectByEntities
- fix(lint): skip wiki pages in post-loop backlink rewrite; collect writtenPaths for log
- fix(schema): rename redirectTo → redirect_to to match snake_case convention
- fix(agent-runner): use !== undefined for embeddingModel sentinel check
- fix(settings): enable embedding toggle shows child fields, add Semantic Search heading
- fix(tests): adapt init fixtures to two-call ingest orchestration
- fix(tests): drop typeof on type-only LocalConfig import in local-config tests

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ikeniborn/obsidian-ai-wiki/compare/0.1.142...0.1.145

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 0.1.142

### New
- feat(ui): add LLM progress steps to all phases; show ingest token count

### Fixes
- fix(lint): move WikiLink warnings yield after write loop
- fix(ui): wikilink warnings after write; lint analysing progress; per-step timing ≥1s; tok/s on in/out
- fix(ingest): include existing pages in knownStems for dead-link detection

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ikeniborn/obsidian-ai-wiki/compare/0.1.141...0.1.142

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 0.1.141

### New
- feat(storage-migration): auto-migrate `.config/` → `_config/` on startup
- feat(lint-chat): read `_wiki_schema.md` and pass `schema_block` to prompt
- feat(lint): merge assess+fix into single CoT+Structured call; per-page UI progress
- feat(ingest): enrich log — CREATED/UPDATED detection, status transitions
- feat(schemas): add WikiPageSchema, WikiPagesOutputSchema, LintOutputSchema, FormatOutputSchema
- feat(wiki-index): rewrite to grouped Markdown format; path and wikilink in `_index.md` entries
- feat(view): Open `_log` / Open `_index` buttons in domain row
- feat(view): persist and restore last selected domain
- feat(view): re-run button in query history rows
- feat(view): live-status section; step time labels; waiting indicator; copy-to-clipboard
- feat(view): auto-collapse Progress section on operation finish
- feat(consent): lazy ShellConsentModal + migrate `shellConsentGiven` from `data.json` to `local.json`
- feat(reinit): show wiki file count in reinit confirm dialog
- feat: IngestScopeModal, ManageSourcesModal, addSourceBtn / openManageSources
- feat: ensureDomainConfig — create `.config/` dir, migrate legacy index/log
- feat: move `_domain.json`, `agent.jsonl`, `dev.jsonl` to `!Wiki/.config/`
- feat(security): shell consent modal and operation guard (F-2c)

### Fixes
- fix(i18n): update `agent.jsonl` path to `_config/` in all locales
- fix(vault-tools): fallback `adapter.write` for hidden dirs; recursive mkdir
- fix(view): step time labels right-aligned; capture chatBubble ref before async render
- fix(security): validateIclaudePath, fs.access probe, folder-scoped collectMdInPaths
- fix(lint): deduplicate dead-link reports per file
- fix(ingest): reject system files from LLM output
- fix: replace `wiki_keywords` with `tags` in prompts and schemas

### Other
- refactor(wiki-path): rename `.config/` → `_config/`, add global constants
- refactor: remove `query-save` from all layers (agent-runner, controller, view, command)
- refactor: extract vault-walk utilities to `src/utils/vault-walk.ts`
- refactor(consent): ShellConsentModal without direct plugin dependency

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ikeniborn/obsidian-ai-wiki/compare/0.1.108...0.1.141

releases.author: ikeniborn
releases.description:
Path-browserify migration complete

Refactored the plugin to use path-browserify instead of Node.js-specific fs/path imports:

- Migrated simple files (source-paths.ts, phases/*) to use path-browserify
- Refactored claude-cli-client.ts to use async callbacks for temp file operations instead of direct fs calls
- Updated controller.ts with static path-browserify import and vault adapter integration
- Added eslint-disable /skip comments for product name "LLM Wiki"

All tests passing (251 tests). Build verified.
releases.name: v0.1.74

releases.author: ikeniborn
releases.description:
## Что нового

- Форма создания домена: поля source paths с автодополнением по папкам vault (FolderSuggest)
- При создании домена с источниками — подсчёт .md файлов и диалог подтверждения перед запуском init
- Расширенный init: фаза 1 — LLM анализирует источники → entity_types + language_notes; фаза 2 — создание wiki-страниц из каждого файла
- Диалог ошибки при обработке файла: Skip / Retry / Stop
- Прогресс-бар в боковой панели во время инициализации
- Исправлен плейсхолдер wiki folder (убран лишний префикс vaults/...)

releases.author: ikeniborn
releases.description:
Fix code quality issues flagged by ObsidianReviewBot:
- Use Setting().setHeading() instead of createEl headings
- Replace inline styles with CSS classes
- Fix onunload Promise/async signature
- Use vault.configDir instead of hardcoded .obsidian
- Fix redundant string | "all" union types
- Remove unused imports
releases.name: v0.1.14

releases.author: ikeniborn
releases.description: Fix code quality issues flagged by ObsidianReviewBot

releases.author: ikeniborn
releases.description:
## What's new

### Per-operation model configuration

Each operation (ingest, query, lint, init) can now use a different model, maxTokens, and temperature — independently for both **claude-agent** and **native-agent** backends.

**Settings toggle** — enable «Per-operation models» in plugin settings to switch from a single global model to per-operation configuration. When enabled:
- Global model and maxTokens fields are hidden
- Four sections appear (Ingest / Query / Lint / Init) each with model + max tokens (+ temperature for native-agent)

**Default per-operation presets for claude-agent:**
| Operation | Model  | Max tokens |
|-----------|--------|-----------|
| ingest    | haiku  | 4096       |
| query     | sonnet | 4096       |
| lint      | haiku  | 4096       |
| init      | sonnet | 8192       |

Settings migrate automatically — existing configurations are unaffected.

releases.author: ikeniborn
releases.description: Initial release
